docString:
`by_cases! h : p` runs the `by_cases h : p` tactic, followed by
`push Not at h` in the second subgoal. For example,
- `by_cases! h : a < b` creates one goal with hypothesis `h : a < b` and
  another with `h : b ‚Č§ a`.
- `by_cases! h : a ‚Č† b` creates one goal with hypothesis `h : a ‚Č† b` and
  another with `h : a = b`.

ref.pp:

- `by_cases! h : a < b` creates one goal with hypothesis `h : a < b` and
  another with `h : b ‚Č§ a`.
- `by_cases! h : a ‚Č† b` creates one goal with hypothesis `h : a ‚Č† b` and
  another with `h : a = b`.
-/
@[tactic_parser 1000]
public meta def byCases! : Lean.ParserDescr‚úĚ :=
  ParserDescr.node‚úĚ `Mathlib.Tactic.ByCases.byCases! 1022
    (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
      (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
        (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol‚úĚ "by_cases! " false‚úĚ) Lean.Parser.Tactic.optConfig)
        (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional
          (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `atomic
            (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ident) (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ " : ")))))
      (ParserDescr.cat‚úĚ `term 0))

@[local tactic_parser 1000]
private meta def tacticTry_push_neg_at__ : Lean.ParserDescr‚úĚ :=
  ParserDescr.node‚úĚ
    (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ

        (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ
          (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ
            (Lean.Name.mkNum‚úĚ
              (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ
                (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ (Lean.Name.mkStr‚úĚ Lean.Name.anonymous‚úĚ "_private") "Mathlib")
                  "Tactic")
                "ByCases")
              0)
            "Mathlib")
          "Tactic")

    1022
    (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen

@[macro Mathlib.Tactic.ByCases.byCases!]
public meta def _aux_Mathlib_Tactic_ByCases___macroRules_Mathlib_Tactic_ByCases_byCases!_1 : Macro‚úĚ := fun
  | `(tactic| by_cases! $cfg:optConfig$e) => `(tactic| by_cases! $cfg h : $e)
  | `(tactic| by_cases! $cfg:optConfig$h : $e) =>
    `(tactic| by_cases $h : $e;
      on_goal 2 => try_push_neg_at$cfg$h:ident)
  | _ => no_error_if_unused% throw‚úĚ Lean.Macro.Exception.unsupportedSyntax‚úĚ
